headline: Blackstone Weighs India Waste Deal As Inflows Lift Assets Above US$1.3t
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) reported material inflows into its credit, insurance, and private equity divisions in Q1, lifting total assets under management above $1.3b. The firm saw withdrawals from some large private credit funds even as overall net inflows stayed positive. Blackstone is reportedly weighing a role in a consortium bid for Indian waste management company Re Sustainability, a high profile M&A process. Blackstone sits at the center of global alternative asset management, and Q1...
